name: Level 14 Ventures Ltd.
summary: Level 14 Ventures Ltd., a mineral exploration company, focuses on the exploration and development of precious metals in Canada. The company is exploring and developing its Green Mountain Property, an exploration stage gold property, which consists of 3 contiguous mineral titles online digitally registered mineral tenures totaling approximately 5,593.5 hectares in located in Osoyoos Mining District in the Province of British Columbia. Level 14 Ventures Ltd. was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
